1099-int:box1.label: Interest income
1099-int:box1.so: Tani waa lacagta ribada ee aad ka heshay sanadkan, tusaale ahaan akoonkaaga kaydka (savings account) bangiga.
1099-int:box1.en: This is the interest money you earned this year, for example from a savings account at the bank.

1099-int:box2.label: Early withdrawal penalty
1099-int:box2.so: Tani waa lacag aad lumisay maxaa yeelay waxaad lacagtaada ka qaadatay akoon kaydin ah ka hor wakhtigeedii.
1099-int:box2.en: This is money you lost as a penalty for taking money out of a savings account before its term was up.

1099-int:box3.label: US Savings Bonds & Treasury interest
1099-int:box3.so: Tani waa ribada laga helay deymaha dawladda Maraykanka (Treasury) ama U.S. Savings Bonds.
1099-int:box3.en: This is interest from U.S. Savings Bonds or Treasury obligations.

1099-int:box4.label: Federal income tax withheld
1099-int:box4.so: Tani waa lacagta canshuurta federaalka ah ee horay laga jaray lacagtan ribada ah, oo dawladda loo diray.
1099-int:box4.en: This is the federal tax that was already taken out of this interest money and sent to the government.

1099-int:box5.label: Investment expenses
1099-int:box5.so: Tani waa qaybtaada ka mid ah kharashka maalgashiga ee la xidhiidha lacagta ribada.
1099-int:box5.en: This is your share of investment expenses related to this interest income.

1099-int:box8.label: Tax-exempt interest
1099-int:box8.so: Tani waa lacag riba ah oo aadan u baahnayn inaad canshuur federaal ah ka bixiso.
1099-int:box8.en: This is interest income that you don't have to pay federal tax on.

1099-int:box9.label: Specified private activity bond interest
1099-int:box9.so: Tani waa qayb ka mid ah ribada sanduuqa 8 oo laga yaabo in lagu canshuuro canshuurta dheeriga ah (AMT).
1099-int:box9.en: This is part of the box 8 interest that may be subject to an extra tax called the Alternative Minimum Tax.

1099-int:box10.label: Market discount
1099-int:box10.so: Tani waa dakhli laga helay bond aad ka iibsatay qiime ka hooseeya qiimaha asalka ah.
1099-int:box10.en: This is income from a bond you bought at a discount below its original price.

1099-int:box11.label: Bond premium
1099-int:box11.so: Tani waa lacag laga jaray ribada bond-ka maxaa yeelay waxaad bond-ka ka iibsatay qiime ka sareeya qiimihiisii asalka ahaa.
1099-int:box11.en: This is an amount subtracted from your bond interest because you paid more than face value for the bond.

1099-int:box13.label: Bond premium on tax-exempt bond
1099-int:box13.so: Tani waa isla dhaca bond-ka, laakiin halkan waxay la xidhiidhaa bond-yada aan canshuur lahayn ee sanduuqa 8.
1099-int:box13.en: This is the same kind of bond premium, but for the tax-exempt bonds reported in box 8.

1099-int:box15.label: State & state ID number
1099-int:box15.so: Tani waa stateka iyo lambarka diiwaangashan ee shirkadda kuu bixisay ribada.
1099-int:box15.en: This is the state and the payer's state-registered ID number.

1099-int:box17.label: State tax withheld
1099-int:box17.so: Tani waa canshuurta stateka ee horay laga jaray lacagtan ribada ah.
1099-int:box17.en: This is any state tax that was already withheld from this interest income.
